$comment: Style guide as code. Every AI-generated asset is validated against this. Locked 2026-06-02. Reference: art/references/heartgold_sample.png (TBD — captured during Milestone 0).

character_sheet_layouts.$comment: Generated at 8× scale (1024x480) so DALL-E/GPT-4o has detail headroom; intake downsamples to native 128x60. Layout: 5 rows × 4 cols, each cell 256×96 in the upscaled input (= 32×12 native) with the 128×96 (= 16×12 native) character centered with 64 px (= 8 native) of magenta padding on each side. Action row stays in the same sheet for now since v3 succeeded; we may split later if combat anims need a tighter pass.

tile_sheet_layout.$comment: Per-terrain 47-tile blob autotile (RPGMaker A2 style). Defined per terrain in art/prompts/tile_*.md.

intake_rules.$comment: If >5% of non-transparent pixels are off-palette, asset is rejected. <5% = auto-snap to nearest.
